note: Shared list locking the risky-pattern heuristic across runtimes. `risky` are patterns QRID_riskyPattern / CheckCharacter::riskyPattern must reject (config error, no compile); `safe` must pass through. The heuristic targets nested/adjacent quantifiers, both unbounded (+ *) and bounded ({n,m}/{n,}); it is a conservative subset and does not claim to catch alternation-overlap ReDoS (e.g. (a|a)+) — that class is handled defensively at match time by the pooled PCRE-error guard.
